title: Block+
body:
# Block+ is a Vanilla+ modpack. 
 **Explore new lands untainted by mods! The ultimate vanilla experience, boosted by quality-of-life mods.**
  With this modpack, you'll **discover Minecraft back again**, **with a lot of new mods**, this pack** comes along many optimisation mods** so you won't suffer the poor performance of you pc while playing this pack. 
  Transform your **vanilla adventures with mods like Tectonic, Terralith or Open Parties and Claims**. **Explore new structures**, **equip your stuff with your backpack**, and **make great cinematic with Flashback.**


**This modpack is optimized. **
   **This modpack is in release but if you have questions or request feel free to contact me on discord Izouku ;) **
